title: Creating Folders
drDigitalIntro:
You can make your own folders to organize files your way.
• One for taxes, one for photos, one for recipes.
• Put the right files inside to keep things tidy.
• Let's make a folder and move a file into it.

playgroundTask.goal: Make a folder and put a file inside it

steps.say: Folders keep your files organized. Click New Folder, type the name Taxes, and press Enter.
Now drag TaxReturn.pdf onto your new Taxes folder — it will light up blue when you hover over it.

drDigitalSuccess: You created a Taxes folder and filed your tax return inside it. That's exactly how you keep a computer organized!
drDigitalHint: Click the glowing New Folder button first, type Taxes, press Enter. Then drag the tax file onto the Taxes folder — it turns blue when you hover.
